title: Search Query
description: Sends a query event every time the shopper makes a full-text search.

url.title: url
url.description: URL that identifies from which page the event occurred.

agent.title: agent
agent.description: Identifies whether the request came from a mobile or desktop application. It's used as a filter in the search report.
agent.example: Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10.15; rv:83.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/83.0

type.title: type
type.description: Type of event, which can be one of the following: `page.cart`, `page.empty_cart`, `search.query`, `page.confirmation`, `session.ping`, `search.click`.

misspelled.title: misspelled
misspelled.description: Indicates whether the query has a typo (`true`) or not (`false`).

match.title: match
match.description: Amount of products retrieved by the search.

operator.title: operator
operator.description: Identifies the type of operator used on the search. The possible values are: `and`, `or`. Find more details in [this Elastic Search guide](https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/elasticsearch/reference/current/query-dsl-match-query.html).
